description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped piece of cheese with a smooth, pale yellow to off-white surface and a slightly darker, thin edge along the bottom, suggesting a natural rind. The cheese has a dense, solid appearance with no visible holes or cracks, and its surface is matte with subtle, uneven coloration. The bottom edge appears slightly rougher and more textured, possibly indicating where the cheese was cut from a larger wheel. The overall form is a tapered triangle, with the broadest face being flat and the sides gently sloping inward. There are no visible labels, packaging, or markings on the cheese. The cheese is unadorned and appears to be placed directly on a neutral, featureless surface.
description: A wedge-shaped, pale yellow cheese with a smooth, matte surface and a slightly darker, thin rind along the bottom edge. The cheese is solid, dense, and unadorned.
description_view_0: The broad, flat face of the cheese wedge is visible, showing the smooth, pale surface and the thin, darker rind at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the gentle slope of the wedge and the continuous, slightly rougher rind along the bottom edge.
description_view_2: The narrow, pointed end of the cheese is visible, emphasizing the tapering shape and the consistent surface texture.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the wedge is shown, with the smooth surface and the subtle color gradient from top to bottom.
attribute_rind_appearance: A thin, slightly darker brown rind is present along the bottom edge, appearing rougher and more textured than the rest of the cheese.
